citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: In classification problems we decide what kind of thing we have based on its features. In search problems we find a path from a start to a goal, such as finding a route on a map or exploring possible moves in a game.
